name_cn:
❣️ Montaigne Avenue Bag
This bag features an elegant design that elevates the classic series.
Exquisitely crafted from white patent leather, the rounded flap curves are refined, adorned with vintage gold-finish metal CD buckle, inspired by the stopper of a Christian Dior perfume bottle.
The back is embossed with the Montaigne logo, paired with a classic chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather.
Accordion pleat design, spacious, refined silhouette, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.
Flap closure
CD buckle
Back Montaigne embossed logo
Adjustable chain made of alternating gold-finish metal and enamel CD links in the same tone as the leather, with leather strap
Three compartments
Dimensions: 22
Model: 9261
